cast on critical strike.description: Must support both an attack skill and a spell skill to work. The attack skill will trigger a spell when it critically strikes an enemy. Cannot support totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.

awakened cast on critical strike.name: Awakened Cast On Critical Strike
awakened cast on critical strike.description: Must support both an attack skill and a spell skill to work. The attack skill will trigger a spell when it critically strikes an enemy. Cannot support totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.

cast on death.name: Cast on Death
cast on death.description: Each supported spell skill will be triggered when you die. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.

cast on ward break.name: Cast on Ward Break
cast on ward break.description: Each supported spell skill will be triggered when your Ward breaks. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.

chain.name: Chain
chain.description: Supports projectile skills, and any other skills that chain.

awakened chain.name: Awakened Chain
awakened chain.description: Supports projectile skills, and any other skills that chain.

greater chain.name: Greater Chain
greater chain.description: Supports projectile skills, and any other skills that chain.

chance to flee.name: Chance to Flee
chance to flee.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

close combat.name: Close Combat
close combat.description: Supports melee attack skills. Cannot support skills which create minions.

cluster traps.name: Cluster Traps
cluster traps.description: Supports traps skills, making them throw extra traps randomly around the targeted location.

cold penetration.name: Cold Penetration
cold penetration.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies, making those hits penetrate enemy cold resistance.

awakened cold penetration.name: Awakened Cold Penetration
awakened cold penetration.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies, making those hits penetrate enemy cold resistance.

companionship.name: Companionship
companionship.description: Supports skills that create minions which can be damaged. Cannot support triggered skills.

critical strike affliction.name: Critical Strike Affliction
critical strike affliction.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

cull the weak.name: Cull the Weak
cull the weak.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies. If normal or magic enemies are left below a percentage of maximum life after being hit by these skills, they will be killed.

culling strike.name: Culling Strike
culling strike.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies. If enemies are left below 10% of maximum life after being hit by these skills, they will be killed.

deadly ailments.name: Deadly Ailments
deadly ailments.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

awakened deadly ailments.name: Awakened Deadly Ailments
awakened deadly ailments.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

enhance.name: Enhance
enhance.description: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the quality of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.

awakened enhance.name: Awakened Enhance
awakened enhance.description: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the quality of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.

focused ballista.name: Focused Ballista
focused ballista.description: Supports skills that summon ballista totems. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

fork.name: Fork
fork.description: Supports projectile skills, making their projectiles fork into two projectiles the first time they hit an enemy and don't pierce it.

awakened fork.name: Awakened Fork
awakened fork.description: Supports projectile skills, making their projectiles fork into two projectiles the first two times they hit an enemy and don't pierce it.

greater fork.name: Greater Fork
greater fork.description: Supports projectile skills, making their projectiles fork into two projectiles the first two times they hit an enemy and don't pierce it.

greater volley.name: Greater Volley
greater volley.description: Supports skills that fire projectiles from the user. Does not affect projectiles fired from other locations as secondary effects. Does not support skills that fire projectiles in a spiral.

hypothermia.name: Hypothermia
hypothermia.description: Supports any skill that deals damage.

ice bite.name: Ice Bite
ice bite.description: Supports any skill you use to hit enemies yourself. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines.

invention.name: Invention
invention.description: Supports skills which throw Traps or Mines.

lethal dose.name: Lethal Dose
lethal dose.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

locus mine.name: Locus Mine
locus mine.description: Supports attack skills that use bows or wands and fire projectiles ahead. Instead of using that skill, you will throw mines that will use the skill for you when you detonate them, targeting your location. Mines cannot use channelling skills.

machinations.name: Machinations
machinations.description: Supports skills that hit enemies. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

chance to poison.name: Chance to Poison
chance to poison.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

mana leech.name: Mana Leech
mana leech.description: Supports attack skills that hit enemies, causing those hits to leech mana based on damage dealt.

manaforged arrows.name: Manaforged Arrows
manaforged arrows.description: Supports bow attack skills, causing them to trigger when you've spent enough mana in total on other bow attacks. Cannot modify the skills of minions. Cannot support totems, traps, mines, Vaal skills, or channelling skills

mirage archer.name: Mirage Archer
mirage archer.description: Supports attack skills that can be used with bows. Supported skills can only be used with bows. Cannot support Vaal skills, minion skills, movement skills, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines.

momentum.name: Momentum
momentum.description: Supports attack skills that aren't triggered.

multiple traps.name: Multiple Traps
multiple traps.description: Supports traps skills, making them throw extra traps in a line.

nightblade.name: Nightblade
nightblade.description: Supports attack skills. Cannot support skills which create minions.

pacifism.name: Pacifism
pacifism.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

sadism.name: Sadism
sadism.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

second wind.name: Second Wind
second wind.description:
Supports skills with cooldowns.
Cannot support triggered skills.

swift affliction.name: Swift Affliction
swift affliction.description: Supports any skill that has a duration, or can hit enemies to inflict ailments on them.

awakened swift affliction.name: Awakened Swift Affliction
awakened swift affliction.description: Supports any skill that has a duration, or can hit enemies to inflict ailments on them.

swift assembly.name: Swift Assembly
swift assembly.description: Supports skills which throw Traps or Mines.

trap.name: Trap
trap.description: Supports spells, or attacks that use bows or wands. Instead of using that skill, you will throw a trap that will use the skill for you when an enemy walks near it. Traps cannot use channelling skills.

trap and mine damage.name: Trap and Mine Damage
trap and mine damage.description: Supports skills which throw Traps or Mines.

unholy trinity.name: Unholy Trinity
unholy trinity.description: Supports skills that hit enemies, causing them to gain bonuses while you have unholy resonance of lightning, physical and chaos, and to grant unholy resonance of damage types other than the highest one in a hit. There is a maximum of 50 unholy resonance for each damage type. Cannot support triggered skills, instant skills, orb skills, brands, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

vile toxins.name: Vile Toxins
vile toxins.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

void manipulation.name: Void Manipulation
void manipulation.description: Supports any skill that deals damage.

awakened void manipulation.name: Awakened Void Manipulation
awakened void manipulation.description: Supports any skill that deals damage.

voidstorm.name: Voidstorm
voidstorm.description: Creates a voidstorm that blinds enemies within it. Entering the storm will cause it to explode, dealing attack damage in an area.

volley.name: Volley
volley.description: Supports skills that fire projectiles from the user. Does not affect projectiles fired from other locations as secondary effects. Does not support skills that fire projectiles in a spiral.

windburst.name: Windburst
windburst.description: Fires projectiles that move randomly and damage enemies they pierce through. They explode after a duration, dealing area damage.

added chaos damage.name: Added Chaos Damage
added chaos damage.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

awakened added chaos damage.name: Awakened Added Chaos Damage
awakened added chaos damage.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

added lightning damage.name: Added Lightning Damage
added lightning damage.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

awakened added lightning damage.name: Awakened Added Lightning Damage
awakened added lightning damage.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

arcane surge.name: Arcane Surge
arcane surge.description: Each supported spell will track how much mana you spend on it, granting a buff when the total mana spent reaches a threshold. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, mines or skills with a reservation.

archmage.name: Archmage
archmage.description: Supports spell skills that deal damage with hits and have no reservation. Cannot support arcane skills, Brand skills, Orb skills, Vaal skills, or skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

blasphemy.name: Blasphemy
blasphemy.description: Supports hex curse skills, turning them into auras that will apply their effect to all enemies in an area around you.

awakened blasphemy.name: Awakened Blasphemy
awakened blasphemy.description: Supports hex curse skills, turning them into auras that will apply their effect to all enemies in an area around you.

eldritch blasphemy.name: Eldritch Blasphemy
eldritch blasphemy.description: Supports hex curse skills, turning them into auras that will apply their effect to all enemies in an area around you.

bonechill.name: Bonechill
bonechill.description: Supports any skill that can chill enemies or create chilling areas.

cast when stunned.name: Cast when Stunned
cast when stunned.description: Each supported spell skill will have a chance to be triggered when you are stunned. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.

cast while channelling.name: Cast while Channelling
cast while channelling.description: Must support both a channelling skill and a non-channelling spell skill to work. The channelling skill will trigger a spell periodically while channelling. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.

awakened cast while channelling.name: Awakened Cast While Channelling
awakened cast while channelling.description: Must support both a channelling skill and a non-channelling spell skill to work. The channelling skill will trigger a spell periodically while channelling. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.

combustion.name: Combustion
combustion.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

concentrated effect.name: Concentrated Effect
concentrated effect.description: Supports any skill with an area of effect, regardless of whether that skill deals damage.

controlled destruction.name: Controlled Destruction
controlled destruction.description: Supports attack skills, or spell skills that deal damage.

awakened controlled destruction.name: Awakened Controlled Destruction
awakened controlled destruction.description: Supports attack skills, or spell skills that deal damage.

cooldown recovery.name: Cooldown Recovery
cooldown recovery.description: Supports skills that have a cooldown. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

hextouch.name: Hextouch
hextouch.description: Must support both a skill that hits enemies, and a hex curse skill to work. The hex will be applied when enemies are hit by the other skill. Cannot support totems, traps, or mines. Minions cannot apply hexes this way.

awakened hextouch.name: Awakened Hextouch
awakened hextouch.description: Must support both a skill that hits enemies, and a hex curse skill to work. The hex will be applied when enemies are hit by the other skill. Cannot support totems, traps, or mines. Minions cannot apply hexes this way.

signal prey.name: Signal Prey
signal prey.description: Applies a debuff to a specific enemy which signals your minions to consider that enemy to be the Prey. All minions from skills supported by any Predator Support will target that enemy. Only one enemy can be the Prey at a time. This skill cannot be used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.

decay.name: Decay
decay.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

devour.name: Devour
devour.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

greater devour.name: Greater Devour
greater devour.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

efficacy.name: Efficacy
efficacy.description: Supports any skill that deals damage or has a duration.

elemental focus.name: Elemental Focus
elemental focus.description: Supports any skill that hits or burns enemies, or inflicts elemental ailments.

awakened elemental focus.name: Awakened Elemental Focus
awakened elemental focus.description: Supports any skill that hits or burns enemies, or inflicts elemental ailments.

elemental proliferation.name: Elemental Proliferation
elemental proliferation.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies, or could otherwise apply elemental ailments.

energy leech.name: Energy Leech
energy leech.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies, causing those hits to leech energy shield based on damage dealt.

enlighten.name: Enlighten
enlighten.description: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.

awakened enlighten.name: Awakened Enlighten
awakened enlighten.description: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.

focused channelling.name: Focused Channelling
focused channelling.description: Supports channelling spells you cast yourself, significantly empowering their damage the longer they are channelled for, while also raising their cost. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

foulgrasp.name: Foulgrasp
foulgrasp.description: Summons forth a field of grasping hands, each of which clutches an orb of lightning. When an enemy is near a hand, the orb it clutches will detonate to deal lightning spell damage.

frostmage.name: Frostmage
frostmage.description: Supports spell skills that deal damage with hits and have no reservation. Cannot support arcane skills, Brand skills, Orb skills, Vaal skills, or skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

gluttony.name: Gluttony
gluttony.description: Supports Projectile Spells you cast yourself. Cannot support orb skills, triggered skills, brand skills, Vaal skills, channelling skills, skills with a reservation, or skills used by things other than you.

hex bloom.name: Hex Bloom
hex bloom.description: Supports hex curse skills. Hexes from auras or cursed ground cannot transfer.

bursting toad.name: Bursting Toad
bursting toad.description: A toad leaps towards enemies and explodes, dealing spell damage in an area.

high-impact mine.name: High-Impact Mine
high-impact mine.description: Supports spells, or attacks that use bows or wands. Instead of using that skill, you will throw a mine that will use the skill for you when you detonate it. Mines cannot use channelling skills.

hiveborn.name: Hiveborn
hiveborn.description: Supports offering skills you use yourself.

summon hiveborn.name: Summon Hiveborn
summon hiveborn.description: Summons a horde of Hiveborn Breach monsters to do your bidding. These summoned monsters have all their physical damage converted to cold.

ignite proliferation.name: Ignite Proliferation
ignite proliferation.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

immolate.name: Immolate
immolate.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

impending doom.name: Impending Doom
impending doom.description: Supports hex curse skills, causing them to trigger Doom Blast when the hex ends. Cannot support curse skills which are triggered or applied as an aura.

doom blast.name: Doom Blast
doom blast.description: Deals chaos damage in an area.

increased area of effect.name: Increased Area of Effect
increased area of effect.description: Supports any skill with an area of effect.

awakened increased area of effect.name: Awakened Increased Area of Effect
awakened increased area of effect.description: Supports any skill with an area of effect.

increased critical damage.name: Increased Critical Damage
increased critical damage.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

increased critical strikes.name: Increased Critical Strikes
increased critical strikes.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

infused channelling.name: Infused Channelling
infused channelling.description: Supports any channelling skill, protecting you from damage while you channel it. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

innervate.name: Innervate
innervate.description: Supports any skill you use to hit enemies yourself. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines.

intensify.name: Intensify
intensify.description: Supports spell skills that you cast yourself. Cannot support triggered skills, Vaal skills, instant skills, channelling skills, skills with a reservation or which create minions, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines.

invert the rules.name: Invert the Rules
invert the rules.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

item rarity.name: Item Rarity
item rarity.description: Supports any skill that can kill enemies.

kinetic instability.name: Kinetic Instability
kinetic instability.description: Supports Wand Attacks, granting them a chance to trigger Kinetic Flux on kill. Cannot support triggered skills or skills used by things other than you. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

kinetic flux.name: Kinetic Flux
kinetic flux.description: Gathers kinetic energy into an anomaly at the targeted location, which will explode when enemies are near it, dealing your wand's damage in an area. The anomaly will dissipate after a duration.

greater kinetic instability.name: Greater Kinetic Instability
greater kinetic instability.description: Supports Wand Attacks, granting them a chance to trigger Kinetic Flux on critical strike. Cannot support triggered skills or skills used by things other than you. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

lightning penetration.name: Lightning Penetration
lightning penetration.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies, making those hits penetrate enemy lightning resistance.

living lightning.name: Living Lightning
living lightning.description: Supports Skills which cause Damaging Hits, causing them to trigger Summon Living Lightning when dealing lightning damage. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of Minions.

summon living lightning.name: Summon Living Lightning
summon living lightning.description: Summons Living Lightning Minions, which target nearby enemies with a number of Melee Chaining Attacks before dissipating. Enemies will not directly engage these Minions, and can pass through them.

awakened lightning penetration.name: Awakened Lightning Penetration
awakened lightning penetration.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies, making those hits penetrate enemy lightning resistance.

minion pact.name: Minion Pact
minion pact.description: Supports spell skills that hit enemies and have no reservation. Cannot support brand skills, orb skills, channelling skills, arcane skills, Vaal skills or skills used by traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

overcharge.name: Overcharge
overcharge.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

overloaded intensity.name: Overloaded Intensity
overloaded intensity.description: Supports spells skills that gain Intensity.

physical to lightning.name: Physical to Lightning
physical to lightning.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

prismatic burst.name: Prismatic Burst
prismatic burst.description: Chooses an element at random and deals damage of that type in an area. Having higher strength makes it more likely to choose fire, higher dexterity makes it more likely to choose cold, and higher intelligence makes it more likely to choose lightning.

pinpoint.name: Pinpoint
pinpoint.description: Supports projectile spells you cast yourself. Cannot support triggered skills, Vaal skills, instant skills, channelling skills, skills with a reservation or which create minions, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines.

power charge on critical.name: Power Charge On Critical
power charge on critical.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

blastchain mine.name: Blastchain Mine
blastchain mine.description: Supports spells, or attacks that use bows or wands. Instead of using that skill, you will throw a mine that will use the skill for you when you detonate it. Mines cannot use channelling skills.

sacred wisps.name: Sacred Wisps
sacred wisps.description: Supports attack skills that can be used with Wands. Cannot support Vaal skills, minion skills, movement skills, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines.

summon sacred wisps.name: Summon Sacred Wisps
summon sacred wisps.description: This skill is triggered by supported skills to summon Sacred Wisps which use the triggering skill when you do.

sacrifice.name: Sacrifice
sacrifice.description: Supports spell skills that hit enemies and have no reservation. Cannot support brand skills, orb skills, channelling skills, arcane skills, Vaal skills or skills used by traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

scornful herald.name: Scornful Herald
scornful herald.description: Supports Herald skills causing them to have higher critical strike chance but no buff effect.

spellblade.name: Spellblade
spellblade.description: Supports spells that hit enemies. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

spell cascade.name: Spell Cascade
spell cascade.description: Supports spell skills that apply an effect to an area around a targeted location. Cannot support Vaal skills or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

awakened spell cascade.name: Awakened Spell Cascade
awakened spell cascade.description: Supports spell skills that apply an effect to an area around a targeted location. Cannot support Vaal skills or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

greater spell cascade.name: Greater Spell Cascade
greater spell cascade.description: Supports spell skills that apply an effect to an area around a targeted location. Cannot support Vaal skills or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

spell echo.name: Spell Echo
spell echo.description: Supports spell skills, making them repeat when cast. Cannot support Vaal skills, totem skills, channelling skills, triggered skills, instant skills, retaliation skills, blink skills, or skills with a reservation.

greater spell echo.name: Greater Spell Echo
greater spell echo.description: Supports spell skills, making them repeat when cast. Cannot support Vaal skills, totem skills, brand skills, channelling skills, triggered skills, instant skills, retaliation skills, blink skills, or skills with a reservation.

awakened spell echo.name: Awakened Spell Echo
awakened spell echo.description: Supports spell skills, making them repeat when cast. Cannot support Vaal skills, totem skills, channelling skills, triggered skills, instant skills, retaliation skills, blink skills, or skills with a reservation.

summon phantasm.name: Summon Phantasm
summon phantasm.description: Supports skills that can hit enemies, or create minions. When those skills or minions kill enemies, or hit rare or unique enemies they will have a chance to summon a Phantasm minion, which uses a piercing projectile spell that deals physical damage.

trinity.name: Trinity
trinity.description: Supports skills that hit enemies, causing them to gain bonuses while you have resonance of all three elements, and to grant resonance of elements other than the highest one in a hit. There is a maximum of 50 Resonance for each Element. Cannot support triggered skills, instant skills, orb skills, brands, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

unbound ailments.name: Unbound Ailments
unbound ailments.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies or inflicts ailments

awakened unbound ailments.name: Awakened Unbound Ailments
awakened unbound ailments.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies or inflicts ailments

unleash.name: Unleash
unleash.description: Supports spell skills, making their effect reoccur when cast. Cannot support skills with cooldowns, triggered skills, Brand skills, Vaal skills, channelling skills, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

awakened unleash.name: Awakened Unleash
awakened unleash.description: Supports spell skills, making their effect reoccur when cast. Cannot support skills with cooldowns, triggered skills, Brand skills, Vaal skills, channelling skills, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

greater unleash.name: Greater Unleash
greater unleash.description: Supports spell skills, making their effect reoccur when cast. Cannot support skills with cooldowns, triggered skills, Brand skills, Vaal skills, channelling skills, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

vaal sacrifice.name: Vaal Sacrifice
vaal sacrifice.description: Supports Vaal spell skills, making them repeat when cast at the cost of your life and energy shield. Cannot support totem skills, channelling skills, triggered skills, instant skills, retaliation skills, blink skills, or skills with a reservation.

added fire damage.name: Added Fire Damage
added fire damage.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

awakened added fire damage.name: Awakened Added Fire Damage
awakened added fire damage.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

ancestral call.name: Ancestral Call
ancestral call.description: Supports melee strike skills, causing them to also strike at extra targets simultaneously. The extra targets must be a minimum distance from the user. If supporting a minion attack skill, the minion's skills will not also strike extra targets. Cannot support Vaal skills or triggered skills.

greater ancestral call.name: Greater Ancestral Call
greater ancestral call.description: Supports melee strike skills, causing them to also strike at extra targets simultaneously. The extra targets must be a minimum distance from the user. If supporting a minion attack skill, the minion's skills will not also strike extra targets. Cannot support Vaal skills or triggered skills.

awakened ancestral call.name: Awakened Ancestral Call
awakened ancestral call.description: Supports melee strike skills, causing them to also strike at extra targets simultaneously. The extra targets must be a minimum distance from the user. If supporting a minion attack skill, the minion's skills will not also strike extra targets. Cannot support Vaal skills or triggered skills.

annihilation.name: Annihilation
annihilation.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

arrogance.name: Arrogance
arrogance.description: Supports any non-blessing skill with a reservation.

blessed call.name: Blessed Call
blessed call.description: Supports Warcries that are not triggered. Supported Warcries create Consecrated Ground, but have lowered area of effect and cooldown recovery.

bloodlust.name: Bloodlust
bloodlust.description: Supports melee attack skills, causing them to deal more damage against bleeding enemies, but preventing those skills from inflicting bleeding on enemies in any way.

bloodsoaked banner.name: Bloodsoaked Banner
bloodsoaked banner.description: Supports banner skills. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

bloodthirst.name: Bloodthirst
bloodthirst.description: Supports attack skills. Cannot support triggered skills, skills which create minions, or skills used by totems, traps or mines.

bonespire.name: Bonespire
bonespire.description: Supports warcry skills you use yourself.

seize the flesh.name: Seize the Flesh
seize the flesh.description: Cause spires of bone to erupt from the earth around you. When you use a slam on them, these spires will explode to deal damage in an area and inflicting bleeding.

brutality.name: Brutality
brutality.description: Supports any skill that deals damage.

awakened brutality.name: Awakened Brutality
awakened brutality.description: Supports any skill that deals damage.

burning damage.name: Burning Damage
burning damage.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies, or can deal burning damage directly.

awakened burning damage.name: Awakened Burning Damage
awakened burning damage.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies, or can deal burning damage directly.

cast on melee kill.name: Cast on Melee Kill
cast on melee kill.description: Must support both a melee attack skill and a spell skill to work. The attack skill will trigger a spell when it kills an enemy. Cannot support totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.

cast when damage taken.name: Cast when Damage Taken
cast when damage taken.description: Each supported spell skill will track damage you take, and be triggered when the total damage taken reaches a threshold. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.

cold to fire.name: Cold to Fire
cold to fire.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

corrupting cry.name: Corrupting Cry
corrupting cry.description: Supports warcry skills. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

cruelty.name: Cruelty
cruelty.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies. Minions cannot gain Cruelty.

damage on full life.name: Damage on Full Life
damage on full life.description: Supports attack skills, providing a bonus to all damage dealt by those skills while your life is full.

divine sentinel.name: Divine Sentinel
divine sentinel.description: Supports skills that create sentinel minions, causing those minions to be created with a beneficial templar aura.

empower.name: Empower
empower.description: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the level of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.

awakened empower.name: Awakened Empower
awakened empower.description: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the level of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.

eternal blessing.name: Eternal Blessing
eternal blessing.description: Supports aura skills that reserve life or mana to create auras around you.

excommunicate.name: Excommunicate
excommunicate.description: Supports melee attacks. Does not modify skills used by minions.

fire penetration.name: Fire Penetration
fire penetration.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies, making those hits penetrate enemy fire resistance.

awakened fire penetration.name: Awakened Fire Penetration
awakened fire penetration.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies, making those hits penetrate enemy fire resistance.

fissure.name: Fissure
fissure.description: Creates multiple fissures that deal area damage while travelling outwards. Requires an Axe, Mace, Sceptre, Staff or Unarmed.

fist of war.name: Fist of War
fist of war.description: Supports slam skills, providing a powerful boost when they're used, with a delay before they can be boosted again. Cannot support Vaal skills or triggered skills. Cannot modify the skills of minions. Only skills you use yourself can receive the boost.

flamewood.name: Flamewood
flamewood.description: Supports skills which summon totems. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

avenging flame.name: Avenging Flame
avenging flame.description: Launches a fiery projectile high into the air, to drop on a target and deal area damage where it lands.

fortify.name: Fortify
fortify.description: Supports melee attack skills that are not triggered.

generosity.name: Generosity
generosity.description: Supports aura skills that affect you and allies, increasing the aura's effect on allies, but preventing it from affecting you at all. Cannot support curse auras, or other auras that only affect enemies. Cannot support skills used by totems. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

awakened generosity.name: Awakened Generosity
awakened generosity.description: Supports aura skills that affect you and allies, increasing the aura's effect on allies, but preventing it from affecting you at all. Cannot support curse auras, or other auras that only affect enemies. Cannot support skills used by totems. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

guardian's blessing.name: Guardian's Blessing
guardian's blessing.description:
Must support both a skill that creates minions which can be damaged, and
 an aura skill that creates permanent auras around you.
Cannot support triggered skills, banner skills or stance skills.

hallow.name: Hallow
hallow.description: Supports melee attacks you use yourself. Does not modify skills used by minions.

more duration.name: More Duration
more duration.description: Supports any skill with a duration.

iron grip.name: Iron Grip
iron grip.description: Supports attack skills that fire projectiles, making the increase to physical melee damage from strength also increase their physical projectile damage.

iron will.name: Iron Will
iron will.description: Supports spell skills, making the increase to physical melee damage from strength also increase their spell damage.

item quantity.name: Item Quantity
item quantity.description: Supports any skill that can kill enemies.

knockback.name: Knockback
knockback.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

less duration.name: Less Duration
less duration.description: Supports any skill that has a duration.

life leech.name: Life Leech
life leech.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies, causing those hits to leech life based on damage dealt.

lifetap.name: Lifetap
lifetap.description: Supports any non-blessing skill. Minions cannot gain the Lifetap buff.

maim.name: Maim
maim.description: Supports attack skills, or other skills that can maim enemies.

melee splash.name: Melee Splash
melee splash.description: Supports melee strike skills, causing their melee strike to deal splash damage around each target hit.

awakened melee splash.name: Awakened Melee Splash
awakened melee splash.description: Supports melee strike skills, causing their melee strike to deal splash damage around each target hit.

multistrike.name: Multistrike
multistrike.description: Supports melee attack skills, making them repeat twice when used, targeting a random enemy each time. Cannot support Vaal skills, channelling skills, travel skills, retaliation skills or triggered skills.

awakened multistrike.name: Awakened Multistrike
awakened multistrike.description: Supports melee attack skills, making them repeat three times when used, targeting a random enemy each time. Cannot support Vaal skills, channelling skills, travel skills, retaliation skills or triggered skills.

greater multistrike.name: Greater Multistrike
greater multistrike.description: Supports melee attack skills, making them repeat three times when used, targeting a random enemy each time. Cannot support Vaal skills, channelling skills, travel skills, retaliation skills or triggered skills.

overexertion.name: Overexertion
overexertion.description: Supports melee attack skills which can be exerted. Cannot modify the skills of minions. Vaal skills and channelling skills cannot be exerted.

overheat.name: Overheat
overheat.description: Supports melee attack skills you use yourself. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

pyre.name: Pyre
pyre.description: Supports melee attack skills. Cannot support triggered attacks, attacks used by things other than you, or skills which create minions.

call the pyre.name: Call the Pyre
call the pyre.description: Calls forth pillars of ashen flame. These pillars deal Fire damage in an area, and cover Enemies they hit in Ash. Requires a Melee Weapon or Unarmed.

rage.name: Rage
rage.description: Supports melee attack skills. Minions cannot gain rage.

ballista totem.name: Ballista Totem
ballista totem.description: Supports any bow or wand attack skill, causing it to summon a ballista totem that uses the skill for you.

inspiration.name: Inspiration
inspiration.description: Supports any skill. Minions, Totems, Traps and Mines cannot gain Inspiration Charges.

ruthless.name: Ruthless
ruthless.description: Supports melee strike or slam skills. Every third time you use a supported attack, that use of the skill will be more powerful.

shockwave.name: Shockwave
shockwave.description: Deals attack damage in an area.

void shockwave.name: Void Shockwave
void shockwave.description: Deals attack damage in an area. A number of enemies hit by the wave will release an additional wave.

spell totem.name: Spell Totem
spell totem.description: Supports spell skills that are not triggered. Instead of casting that spell, you will summon a totem that casts the spell for you.

stun.name: Stun
stun.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies, making it easier to stun enemies with those skills.

trauma.name: Trauma
trauma.description: Supports melee strike skills that do not inherently apply Trauma. Cannot support triggered skills, Vaal skills, or skills used by things other than you. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
